# Open Label .eu

> Free, open-source platform for generating EU ESPR-compliant Digital Product Passports (DPPs) with QR codes for wine, batteries, textiles, electronics and other product categories.

Open Label .eu lets companies create unlimited Digital Product Passports for free. Each passport gets a public, long-lived URL and printable QR code so end consumers can access regulatory product information.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the DPP generator and supported categories.
- [Referral Leaderboard](/referral-leaderboard): Public ranking of referral codes by valid signups.
- [Legal Mentions](/legal): Publisher and legal information.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms): Terms of use for the platform.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for DPP authors.
